title: Disney Frozen 2 Party Flag Banner
features: Complete the set of Party ware with further matching tableware
description: From the manufacturer Disney Frozen After its debut in 2013, Frozen went on to become the highest-grossing animated film of all time. Frozen enthralled audiences world-wide with its unforgettable characters, an Academy Award-winning soundtrack, and universal themes of empowerment and sisterhood. Frozen 2 inspires feelings of family / home, truth, self-discovery, courage, adventure, empowerment and many others. Complete your Disney Princess Party with.. Disney Frozen Plates Each pack includes 8 Frozen Paper Plates. Each measuring 23cm. Ideal for a Disney Frozen celebration! Disney Frozen Cups Each pack includes 8 Frozen Paper Cups. An ideal disposable option for a Disney Frozen Party. Disney Frozen Napkins Each pack includes 20 Paper Disney Frozen Napkins (2ply). On hand to mop up any spillages, these are a must for a Disney Frozen Party! Disney Princess Table Cover Each table cover measures 120cm x 180cm and is made from a plastic material. Perfect item to decorate your table with a Disney Frozen theme!
